chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No.D- 806 of 2019 C.P.No. D- 31 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on CMA 936/23 3. For orders on CMA 937/23 4. For orders on CMA 274/23 5. For orders on CMA 275/23 6. For Hearing of Main Case 20-02-2024 Mr. Abdul Rasheed Kalwar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Daim Hussain Bhanbhro, Associate of Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for intervenors in C.P.No.D-806 of 2019. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioners after arguing the matters at some length submits that pursuance to show-cause notice challenged in C.P.No.D-31 of 2023, dated 16.12.2022, the Commissioner, Sukkur Division has passed order cancelling the entry in the record-of-rights in favour of petitioners to the extent of survey No.55, which he intends to challenge before the relevant forums, as previously in civil litigation, decisions have already come in favour of petitioners. However, since this petition, in view of the order passed by the Commissioner, Sukkur Division, as above, has become infructuous. Therefore, he does not press these petitions with permission to file relevant proceedings against the order before the relevant forums. Accordingly, in view of above, these petitions along with listed applications are disposed of in the above terms, as not pressed. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
